title: Mahuadanr Wolf Sanctuary
tagline: Mahuadanr Wolf Sanctuary — wildlife reserve of Jharkhand

overview.short: Mahuadanr Wolf Sanctuary is a wildlife sanctuary located in Latehar district of Jharkhand.
overview.description: Mahuadanr Wolf Sanctuary is a wildlife sanctuary located in Latehar district of Jharkhand. It is part of Palamau Tiger Reserve. It was declared to be a wildlife sanctuary in 1976 for the protection of the Indian wolf. Its the only wildlife sanctuary in India dedicated exclusively to the Indian grey wolf.

topPlaces.name: Lodh Falls
topPlaces.description: The Lodh Falls (also known as Budha Ghagh) is a waterfall on the Burha River in the mid-forest of Palamau Tiger Reserve, in Latehar district of Jharkhand state in India. It is the highest waterfall in Jharkhand and the 21st highest waterfall in India.

topPlaces.name: Mahuadanr
topPlaces.description: Mahuadanr is a village Panchayat located in the Latehar district of Jharkhand state, India. Mahuadanr is one of the two subdivisions of the district Latehar (Latehar and Mahuadanr) and one of the 9 Development Blocks, namely Latehar, Chandwa, Balumath, Bariyatu, Herhanj, Manika, Barwadih, Garu and Mahuadanr.

items.note: The Lodh Falls (also known as Budha Ghagh) is a waterfall on the Burha River in the mid-forest of Palamau Tiger Reserve, in Latehar district of Jharkhand state in India. It is the highest waterfall in Jharkhand and the 21st highest waterfall in India.

Mahuadanr is a village Panchayat located in the Latehar district of Jharkhand state, India. Mahuadanr is one of the two subdivisions of the district Latehar (Latehar and Mahuadanr) and one of the 9 Development Blocks, namely Latehar, Chandwa, Balumath, Bariyatu, Herhanj, Manika, Barwadih, Garu and Mahuadanr.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Mahuadanr Wolf Sanctuary?
faq.a: The best time to visit Mahuadanr Wolf Sanctuary is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Mahuadanr Wolf Sanctuary?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Birsa Munda Airport, Ranchi (132 km) and the nearest railway station is Ranchi Junction (132 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Mahuadanr Wolf Sanctuary?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Mahuadanr Wolf Sanctuary at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Mahuadanr Wolf Sanctuary?
faq.a: Stays in Mahuadanr Wolf Sanctuary start from ₹2,500 per night, with options across 5 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Mahuadanr Wolf Sanctuary?
faq.a: The top attractions are Lodh Falls, Mahuadanr.
